result.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo Reveals the Finalists of Doodle for Google 2025 – 2026
result.description:
Every year, Doodle for Google invites K–12 students to design the Google homepage. This year, we asked them to tell the story of their unique superpowers — and we brought in some all-star backup to help share the results. Check out the top 5 finalists, revealed by Giannis Antetokounmpo, and go vote on your favorite at https://doodles.google.com/d4g/
Voting is open from April 16 – 29

#GoogleDoodle #GiannisAntetokounmpo #DoodleforGoogle

result.title: This is basically how quantum computers think.
result.description:
An expert from Google’s Quantum AI Lab helps explain the mind-blowing concept of quantum interference and how it helps quantum computers solve problems so quickly. 

#Quantum

result.title: What is Quantum Mechanics? | Google Quantum AI
result.description:
Curious about quantum? Step onto Google’s Quantum AI Campus to get answers to some of the world’s top trending quantum questions. In this video, experts Jenna and Andrew break down the basics of quantum mechanics, the purpose behind quantum computers, as well as set the record straight on how this technology could actually be used. #Quantum  

00:10 - Introductions
00:25 - What is Quantum Mechanics in Real Life? 
00:49 - What is Quantum Computing?
01:09 - What is a Qubit? 
01:54 - Why is Quantum Physics so Hard? 
02:14 - Can Quantum Computers Simulate Molecules Faster? 
02:34 - Will Quantum Computers Ever Work? 
02:54 - What are Quantum Computers Used For?
